name: hydrate-buddy-app
description: A small desktop companion for hydration reminders.
author: jocsa

scripts.dist:mac:friends:m4: CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never -c.mac.forceCodeSigning=false -c.mac.identity=- -c.mac.notarize=false -c.mac.hardenedRuntime=false -c.mac.gatekeeperAssess=false && node scripts/verify-mac-menu-bar.mjs
scripts.dist:mac:friends:universal: CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish never -c.mac.forceCodeSigning=false -c.mac.identity=- -c.mac.notarize=false -c.mac.hardenedRuntime=false -c.mac.gatekeeperAssess=false && node scripts/verify-mac-menu-bar.mjs
scripts.release:mac: node scripts/assert-mac-release-env.mjs && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never && node scripts/verify-mac-release.mjs
scripts.release:github: node scripts/assert-mac-release-env.mjs && node scripts/assert-github-release-env.mjs && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish always && node scripts/verify-mac-release.mjs
